changelog: Fix freeze on double-click 'Send log to support' (Outlook COM on STA thread with 10s timeout). Support reports moved from Desktop to %USERPROFILE%/.revitcortex/support-reports with auto-rotation. New settings: keep-count, Open folder, Delete all now. UI auto-translated EN/IT based on Revit language. usage-mcp.db and plugin_version now included in the diagnostic ZIP. Thread-safety fixes on router dispatcher and session ApproveAll flag.
